title: NSUI protests after NTA cancels NEET-UG 2026 over paper leak
content: NSUI said the cancellation of the examination itself proves that large-scale irregularities and serious lapses had taken place in the NEET examination process

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled LIVE: CBI to probe paper leak allegations
content: The NEET-UG examination for students seeking admission to undergraduate courses in medical colleges will now be held again on dates to be notified separately

title: Caregiver alleges physical abuse, starvation by employers based in IIM Bengaluru campus
content: She alleged that, since 2021, her employers had been denying her proper food, physically assaulting her during disagreements, and frequently confiscating and checking her mobile phone

title: Rani Kapur alleges “forced takeover” bid in fresh plea before Supreme Court
content: The octogenarian has accused her daughter-in-law, Ms. Priya Kapur, of attempting to assume control over key companies and assets linked to the family estate despite an ongoing court-appointed mediation process

title: Tamil Nadu government formation 2026: a timeline of events
content: Following inconclusive Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu that led to an unprecedented hung Assembly in the State in May 2026, government formation was delayed amidst coalition discussions. Here is a timeline of events.

title: Watch: Opposition leaders lauds Tamil Nadu CM Vijay’s order to close 717 TASMAC shops
content: Some opposition leaders such as AIADMK leader SP Velumani and VCK MLA Vanniyarasu have even welcomed the move

title: India at Venice Biennale 2026 curtain raiser: Many voices, one resonance
content: From soil and thread to immersive myth and monumental sculpture, India’s Venice Biennale 2026 presence expands beyond the pavilion into a layered meditation on home and identity

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled, fresh exam to be conducted following paper leak allegations
content: The revised examination dates and admit card release schedule will be communicated through the official channels of the National Testing Agency

title: India declines Russian LNG under sanctions, talks continue on permitted cargoes, sources say
content: India’s reluctance has left an LNG cargo from ‌Russia’s U.S.-sanctioned ⁠Portovaya plant in the Baltic Sea unable to discharge, despite indicating India as ⁠its destination in mid-April

title: Petroleum Minister does not rule out fuel price hike amidst concerns about mounting OMCs’ losses
content: Speaking at the CII Annual Business Summit 2026, Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri said India has 60 days of crude oil and LNG stock, and 45 days of rolling stock of LPG

title: PM’s Telangana visit: Did BJP internal wranglings upset Modi?
content: Sources within the party claimed that the Prime Minister was utterly unhappy due to persistent internal differences and factional politics

title: Ensure adequate supply of drinking water during summer: T.N. CM Vijay instructs officials
content: The Chief Minister instructed officials to remove challenges in the supply of drinking water in all districts, as well as in the Greater Chennai Corporation (GCC), by employing lorries and through other means

title: Behind bars by choice: Hyderabad’s Chanchalguda Jail now lets citizens ‘feel the jail’ at ₹2,000 for 24 hours
content: The 24-hour “Feel the Jail” experience has been priced at ₹2,000, while those opting for a shorter 12-hour stay will pay ₹1,000

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay orders closure of 717 TASMAC shops near educational institutions, places of worship
content: Of the 717 shops, 276 are located within 500 m from various places of worship, 186 near educational institutions, and 255 near bus terminuses

title: Yogi model praised at CII Summit
content: Industrialists said that under the leadership of CM Yogi Adityanath, Uttar Pradesh has built a new identity in law and order, investment, and industrial development

title: WFI blocking Vinesh while new mothers are helped worldwide in comeback, says Sakshi Malik
content: A defiant Vinesh showed up at the National Open Ranking Tournament in Gonda even though WFI had declared her ineligible

title: Six Indian fishermen arrested by Sri Lankan Navy; country boat seized
content: While they were fishing in the South Mannar region early on Tuesday, a patrolling team from the Sri Lankan Navy apprehended the fishermen, along with their boat, and escorted them to the Dikkowita Fishing Harbour

title: Mock anti‑hijack exercise conducted at Mysuru airport
content: The mock exercise was aimed at demonstrating Mysuru airport’s preparedness to handle aviation security contingencies

title: Vizag Port handles 26% of India’s seafood exports; shipments hit record ₹72,325 crore
content: The port handled 5.12 lakh metric tonnes of seafood, more than 26% of the national export volume in 2025-26

title: Palaniswami’s group slams AIADMK rebels headed by Shanmugam
content: In a post on its social media handle (@AIADMKOfficial), the group contended that an “assembly” of those who could not register electoral success in their home districts was “dishing out a bundle of lies”

title: TMC MLA Madan Mitra hospitalised
content: "He was brought in with certain urinary system issues and is currently under medical observation. His condition is stable, and he is responding well to treatment," a hospital official said

title: MGP urges Karnataka government against appealing SC verdict on heritage Devaraja Market and Lansdowne Building in Mysuru
content: Dr. Bhamy V. Shenoy says delay in restoration over the past three years has worsened deterioration of Devaraja Market and Lansdowne Building, which are heritage structures

title: Fourteen lakh kanals of State land encroached in Jammu; three lakh in Kashmir: Official data
content: The data revealed stark regional differences, with seven districts of Jammu recording more than one lakh kanals of encroached State land each, while two districts crossed the two lakh mark

title: Use AI to identify potholes, expedite water works: Bharath tells Kurnool civic officials
content: The minister set a one-month deadline for water pipeline works and ordered development of six parks in the initial phase

title: Gelatin sticks on PM convoy route: Timer circuit recovered by Bengaluru police
content: Police found not only gelatin sticks, but also an electronic circuit and equipment suspected to be meant for connecting detonators

title: Man nabbed with bullets from new Assam government swearing-in venue
content: The live bullets were recovered from the man during security screening at the entrance of the Veterinary College Field in Khanapara

title: Tussle over CM lays bare fault lines in Congress
content: Several senior Congress leaders and ordinary workers feel let down by the party’s insouciance. IUML, which spearheaded the UDF poll campaign successfully in many constituencies, has reason to be annoyed.  Congress’ central leadership should have anticipated the present scenario, more so with the AICC general secretary in charge of the organisation being in contention, and acted pre-emptively by laying out its criteria for the chief ministerial choice

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma takes oath as Assam CM for second successive time
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, many of his Cabinet colleagues, Chief Ministers of 22 NDA-ruled states, foreign delegates, industrialists, and religious heads attended the swearing-in ceremony

title: AICC begins consultations with Kerala leaders in New Delhi to decide on Congress’ Chief Minister candidate
content: AICC general secretary K.C. Venugopal, former Leader of the Opposition V.D. Satheesan and senior leader Ramesh Chennithala are reportedly the top contenders for CM’s mantle

title: Former Army personnel accused of murdering three in Uttar Pradesh’s Chandauli district killed in encounter
content: The encounter took place when Gurpreet Singh was being taken to Sakaldiha village to recreate the crime scene

title: Watch: DMK MLA and LoP Udhayanidhi Stalin’s maiden speech in T.N. assembly
content: Leader of Opposition and DMK MLA Udhayanidhi Stalin addressed the Tamil Nadu Assembly on Tuesday and said revived the anti-Sanatan pitch in Assembly. He also reiterated call for its eradication

title: India expects the U.S. team to visit India for next round of trade talks, say officials
content: India and the U.S. issued a joint statement on February 7 finalising a framework for an interim trade agreement regarding reciprocal and mutually beneficial trade

title: Lessons from the history of rebellions in AIADMK and DMK in Tamil Nadu
content: With discomfort in the AIADMK showing no signs of subsiding, after former School Education Minister and veteran leader K.A. Sengottaiyan was divested of party posts following his call for the return of estranged leaders, it is a timely moment to revisit some of the most significant uprisings within Tamil Nadu’s two major Dravidian parties

title: TVK’s Tirupattur MLA, who won by one vote, not to take part in trust vote in Assembly: Madras High Court
content: Justices L. Victoria Gowri and N. Senthilkumar pass the interim order on a writ petition filed by DMK former Minister K.R. Periakaruppan

title: Chief Minister Vijay gives maiden speech in Tamil Nadu Assembly
content: Addressing legislators after assuming office, Mr. Vijay outlined his government’s priorities on governance, welfare, youth development and transparency while urging cooperation across party lines.

title: Suvendu aide Chandranath Rath murder: CBI takes over probe
content: The agency constituted a seven-member Special Investigation Team (SIT), comprising seasoned officers from multiple States, to probe the killing

title: Visakhapatnam Steel Plant: Four RINL employees hospitalised after gas leak at Blast Furnace
content: Three of the four employees have been discharged after treatment; one shifted to private hospital for respiratory care

title: ‘Balan The Boy’: ‘Manjummel Boys’ director Chidambaram’s next gets release date
content: Written by Chidambaram and writer-director Jithu Madhavan, known for hit films such as ‘Aavesham’ and ‘Romancham’, ‘Balan The Boy’ is expected to be a story about identity and a sense of belonging.

title: Returnable plots allotted to 98% of Amaravati land pooling farmers, says Narayana
content: According to official data, 63,295 of 70,824 returnable plots, accounting for 89%, had been registered while 7,529 plots remained pending

title: In BJP-ECI's 'chor bazaar', bigger the theft, bigger the reward: Rahul's on WB Government appointments
content: The Congress has claimed that the appointments reflected the "brazen collusion and connivance" between the Election Commission and the BJP

title: PM Modi welcomes move to implement Ayushman Bharat scheme in West Bengal
content: Under the Centre's flagship programme, health insurance of up to ₹5 lakh is provided to each eligible household annually

title: ‘Cancel your own foreign tours’: Opposition leaders in Maharashtra slam PM
content: Mr Modi has appealed citizens to avoid foreign travel for a year, avoid buying gold, use public transport and electric vehicles [EVs], and adopt work from home

title: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma’s political timeline
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma is the chief minister of the state and is widely credited with consolidating the BJP’s hold in the North-East.

title: Bangladeshi national sentenced to three-year imprisonment by U.P. court for forging Indian passport
content: Special Judge, Ballia, Ramkripal, on May 11 held Abdul Amin guilty and also imposed a fine of ₹10,000 on him, says Superintendent of Police Omvir Singh

title: SP MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi booked over ‘anti-national’ remark on PM Modi
content: The police action came at the complaint of BJP district media in-charge Satyendra Pratap Gupta, who accused Mr. Lodhi of stoking “caste hatred” with his remark on Mr. Modi

title: Malaysia, Tamil Nadu share deep ties, says PM Anwar Ibrahim; congratulates new Tamil Nadu CM Joseph Vijay
content: In a post on X, Anwar Ibrahim said that for many years, CM Vijay's "adoring fans watched him defeat corrupt politicians and assorted villains within three hours, usually after a short interval"

title: Federalism in the bin: Why India’s waste crisis cannot be solved by central decree
content: The Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026, disregard federalism and embody a technocratic vision of environmental governance, insufficiently attentive to ground realities; as framed, they risk producing blurred accountability, unproductive compliance work, and paper reporting rather than cleaner cities and villages

title: PM Modi’s call to stop foreign travel comes as spending in this area has already been falling
content: RBI data shows that the real growth areas in terms of foreign spending are purchases of immovable assets abroad and  investments in foreign debt and equity

title: Union Minister Pemmasani urges Nitin Gadkari to resolve traffic woes at Guntur bypass
content: Pemmasani also flagged a rise in road accidents in the area and stressed the need for immediate corrective measures in the interest of public safety

title: CBSE Class 12 results 2026: When and where will the marks be declared?
content: Approximately 1.8 million students are reported to have appeared for the exam in the 2026 academic session across Science, Commerce and Humanities streams from February to April

title: Split wide open in AIADMK, MLAs are divided over support to Palaniswami
content: Churning in AIADMK becomes evident as two groups submit letter backing Palaniswami and former Minister Velumani for Leader of the Opposition

title: China’s Foreign Minister to skip BRICS Delhi meet for ‘scheduling reasons’
content: China will not be sending any other high-level official for the meeting, the Foreign Ministry indicated

title: AIADMK faction led by C.Ve. Shanmugam declares support to TVK; says EPS wanted to be CM with DMK backing
content: We are no longer in any pre-poll alliance, says former Minister C.Ve. Shanmugam; it is believed of the total of 47 AIADMK legislators, 30 MLAs are with the group led by Mr. Shanmugam and S.P. Velumani.

title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled: How a 'guess paper' leak derailed the exam and what happens next
content: NEET-UG 2026 exam has been cancelled by the National Testing Agency due to a massive "guess paper" leak, impacting over 22 lakh students. The government has ordered a CBI probe into the alleged irregularities. The re-examination dates will be announced soon, with existing registrations carrying forward. This decision aims to protect the integrity of the national examination system.

title: AIADMK split on the cards? Big twist looms ahead of Vijay’s crucial floor test
content: A faction of AIADMK, led by S.P. Velumani and C.V. Shanmugam, has announced support for Chief Minister Vijay's TVK government ahead of a crucial floor test. This move comes amid internal rifts within AIADMK over potential alliances, with the faction opposing any tie-up with DMK. Vijay is working to secure the required majority with support from various parties.

title: Oly medallist Sakshi speaks out on Vinesh debacle, seeks PM Modi’s help
content: Olympic medallist Sakshi Malik has backed Vinesh Phogat in her dispute with the Wrestling Federation of India over returning from retirement. Sakshi urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi and sports minister Mansukh Mandaviya to intervene, saying many countries support athletes after motherhood. Vinesh, now a Congress MLA and mother of a 10-month-old, is challenging WFI’s six-month comeback rule.

title: Why is stock market crashing today? Rs 10.11 lakh cr wealth wiped out - top reasons
content: One of the key triggers behind the market decline was renewed uncertainty surrounding the US-Iran conflict. US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was “on life support” after Tehran rejected Washington’s latest proposal aimed at ending the conflict. Trump described Iran’s demands as “garbage.”

title: What is Canada's Bill C-22 & why Apple, Meta say it will make Canadians 'less safe'
content: Canada's Bill C-22, also called the Lawful Access Act, 2026, is a proposed law that would give law enforcement and spy agency CSIS sweeping powers to access private digital data. Apple and Meta say it could force companies to break encryption and build government backdoors—making Canadians less safe. The bill is currently being debated in the House of Commons, and its vague language around "systemic vulnerabilities" is what's got the tech industry worried.

title: 'Sanatana Dharma must be abolished': Udhayanidhi Stalin in Tamil Nadu assembly
content: Udhayanidhi Stalin, as Leader of Opposition in the Tamil Nadu assembly, reiterated his call for the eradication of Sanatan Dharma, stating it divides people. He also emphasized the primacy of the Tamil invocation song, "Tamil Thai Vazhthu," at all government events, demanding it not be sidelined.

title: Vijay’s astrologer, who predicted TVK victory a year ago, appointed OSD
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay has appointed astrologer Rickey Radhan Pandit Vettrivel as Officer on Special Duty (OSD) to the Chief Minister (Political). This appointment, effective from the date of joining, aims to bolster Vijay's political and administrative team. Vettrivel is known for his association with the actor-turned-politician.

title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs and CEO Mark Zuckerberg is making priorities clear for all employees
content: Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs on May 20 as CEO Mark Zuckerberg rebuilds the company around small, AI-powered teams. With capex hitting a record $125–145 billion this year, CFO Susan Li admitted there's no clean answer for what Meta's ideal headcount even looks like anymore. The company wants builders who can ship alone what teams once built together—and is letting everyone else go.

title: POCSO court sentences man to 20 years imprisonment for raping minor girl at gunpoint in Nuh
content: A significant ruling from a Nuh court has resulted in a 20-year rigorous imprisonment for a man convicted of the 2023 rape of a minor. Allegations surfaced that he abducted the young girl at gunpoint, leading to his conviction under the IPC and POCSO Act.

title: NEET (UG) 2026 exam cancelled; new dates to be announced soon
content: NEET UG 2026 cancelled: The National Testing Agency has cancelled the NEET UG 2026 examination conducted on May 3 and announced a fresh examination after inputs reviewed with central agencies and investigative findings shared by law enforcement authorities. The Government of India has also ordered a CBI inquiry into the allegations linked to the examination. NTA said no fresh registration would be required for candidates, examination fees would be refunded, and revised exam dates and admit cards would be announced separately through official channels.

title: From buying less gold to cashing it: How industry plans to cut India’s import bill
content: Facing a widening trade deficit, India's Prime Minister urges reduced gold purchases. Industry bodies propose tapping into the nation's vast household gold reserves. Their plan involves using refined household gold for domestic demand and channeling imported gold into jewellery exports via gold metal loans, aiming to boost working capital and cut imports.

title: India Inc responds to PM Modi’s appeal on WFH work again, cuts non-essential travel
content: Corporate India is embracing Prime Minister Modi's call for work-from-home and reduced travel. Major companies like KPMG, Deloitte, and Tata Motors are reviewing policies, with many already operating hybrid models. Businesses are prioritizing virtual meetings and restricting non-essential trips to conserve foreign exchange and ensure continuity amidst global uncertainties.

title: Gold recycling after Modi's appeal: Jewellery industry says it's smarter
content: India's jewellery industry urges against curbing gold purchases, emphasizing its cultural significance as savings and tradition. Instead, they propose enhanced gold recycling and domestic mobilization to ease foreign exchange pressure. This approach aims to protect millions of livelihoods tied to the sector, from artisans to small businesses, by circulating existing gold rather than stifling demand.

title: 'Bigger theft, bigger reward': Rahul's 'chor bazaar' jab at BJP, EC over Bengal chief secy move
content: Rahul Gandhi and TMC have sharply criticised the appointment of former chief electoral officer Manoj Agarwal as West Bengal's chief secretary by the new BJP government. Critics allege this rewards Agarwal for his role in the recent Assembly elections, questioning the Election Commission's neutrality and the fairness of the polls. The BJP defends the decision, citing service rules.

title: Tamim Iqbal slams BCB for T20 WC snub: 'There was room to find solution'
content: Former captain Tamim Iqbal, now heading an interim BCB committee, expressed disappointment over Bangladesh's mishandled exclusion from the T20 World Cup 2026. He believes the previous administration failed to find a compromise with the ICC, costing the country a valuable opportunity. Tamim also emphasized the strong relationship between the BCB and BCCI, assuring India of Bangladesh's safety for future tours.

title: Mother of 'sharpshooter' Raj Singh rejects police theory in Suvendu's aide murder probe
content: The mother of alleged sharpshooter Raj Singh claims her son was in Lucknow and Ayodhya with family during the murder of Suvendu Adhikari's PA. She stated they attended a wedding in Lucknow on May 7, visited shrines in Ambedkar Nagar and Ayodhya, and were intercepted by police.

title: A mother’s liver donation gave her 17-yr-old son a second chance at life
content: A mother's love proved stronger than fear when her 17-year-old son Armaan faced acute liver failure. Renu Khanna donated a portion of her liver in a life-saving transplant at Apollo Hospitals Navi Mumbai. Doctors successfully performed the surgery, and both mother and son are now recovering. This remarkable act highlights the power of maternal sacrifice and medical expertise.

title: 'Aansu nikal jaate the': Kiara breaks down over postpartum struggles - 3 parenting lessons
content: Kiara Advani candidly shared her profound postpartum experience, describing it as a significant emotional and physical reset that reshaped her identity. She emphasized the importance of discussing postpartum struggles openly, highlighting the challenges of self-grace and maintaining one's sense of self amidst the demands of new motherhood. Advani also praised her husband Sidharth Malhotra's supportive role during this transformative period.

title: ‘Taco’ out, ‘Nacho’ in? Wall Street coins new Trump term before China visit
content: Wall Street's market sentiment has shifted from 'TACO' (Trump Always Chickens Out) to 'NACHO' (Not A Chance Hormuz Opens), reflecting growing pessimism about the Strait of Hormuz crisis. Investors now anticipate a prolonged period of elevated oil prices and shipping risks, moving away from assumptions of a quick resolution.

title: 69 days of crude, 45 days of LPG stock: Petrol minister Puri assures ‘no supply issue’
content: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri assured stable fuel and cooking gas supplies, stating the country holds 69 days of crude oil and LNG reserves and 45 days of LPG.  Daily LPG production has been significantly increased to 54,000 tonnes amid Middle East geopolitical tensions. Puri also echoed Prime Minister Modi's call for austerity to mitigate economic pressures.

title: Sooryavanshi 'a slight liability in the field'? Former India batter flags RR
content: Sanjay Manjrekar expresses concern over Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's limited role as an Impact Player in IPL 2026. He argues that restricting the 15-year-old to just batting hinders his overall cricketing development, emphasizing the importance of fielding experience and pressure situations for a complete cricketer.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma takes oath as Assam CM - what his cabinet looks like
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has been sworn in as Assam's chief minister for a second term, marking a significant win for the BJP-led NDA. The grand ceremony in Guwahati was attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and other top leaders. The alliance secured a decisive victory in the recent assembly elections, reinforcing their strong hold in the northeastern state.

title: Venugopal, Satheesan or Chennithala? Cong high command steps in as Kerala CM race hits deadlock
content: The Congress-led UDF in Kerala is struggling to name its chief ministerial candidate over a week after winning the elections. Senior leaders are in Delhi for discussions, with Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge expected to make the final decision. Ramesh Chennithala, V D Satheesan, and K C Venugopal are the frontrunners amidst internal tussle and external criticism.

title: Telugu actor K Bharat Kanth passes away at 31
content: Telugu actor and digital creator K Bharat Kanth tragically died in a road accident near Hyderabad. The 31-year-old, known for his social media presence and roles in films like ‘Gramam’, lost his life when his vehicle collided with a container lorry on the Outer Ring Road. His untimely passing has deeply saddened fans and the entertainment fraternity.

title: Woman kills lover with ex’s help; son’s blood-stained notebook exposes murder plot
content: A blood-stained child's notebook, initially overlooked, became the crucial clue in a blind murder case in Madhya Pradesh. Investigators traced the handwriting and signatures to a tutor and then to a student's family, whose sudden disappearance led to their arrest.

title: Etihad Chennai-Abu Dhabi flight cancelled after fire detected on wing during take-off
content: An Etihad Airways flight bound for Abu Dhabi from Chennai was cancelled Monday after a fire erupted on its left wing during take-off preparations. Pilots promptly halted the aircraft, and all 280 passengers were safely evacuated without any injuries. Firefighters quickly extinguished the blaze, ensuring no further damage or casualties. The cause remains under investigation.

title: Quest for a rare bird, a landfill stop, & a deadly virus: How did 'patient zero' catch hantavirus?
content: A Dutch ornithologist, Leo Schilperoord, has been identified as patient zero in a deadly hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship. Authorities suspect he and his wife contracted the virus from rat droppings during a birdwatching trip in Argentina. The outbreak led to multiple deaths and a global health alert.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay orders closure of 717 liquor shops near temples, schools, bus stands
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay has ordered the closure of 717 TASMAC liquor outlets within two weeks. These shops are located within 500 meters of places of worship, educational institutions, and bus stands across the state. The directive follows a statewide inspection aimed at stricter regulation and addressing public concerns.

title: Rs 12 lakh fine for Delhi captain Axar Patel after win vs PBKS
content: Axar Patel was fined Rs 12 lakh after Delhi Capitals maintained a slow over rate during their thrilling three-wicket IPL 2026 win over Punjab Kings. Axar scored 56 while David Miller added 51 in Delhi’s successful chase of 211. Madhav Tiwari starred with two wickets and a calm finishing cameo as Delhi kept their playoff hopes alive.

title: Suvendu aide murder case: CBI takes over probe from Bengal Police, forms 7-member team
content: The CBI has taken over the murder investigation of Chandranath Rath, an aide to Suvendu Adhikari, following a recommendation from the Bengal Police. Rath was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in North 24 Parganas. Three suspects, including an alleged sharpshooter, have been arrested by the CID in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

title: Explained: Why Yuzvendra Chahal didn’t bowl vs DC?
content: Punjab Kings' bowling strategy faced criticism after Yuzvendra Chahal was not utilized in their three-wicket loss to Delhi Capitals. Despite a strong start, PBKS suffered their fourth consecutive defeat, with dropped catches and a strong partnership from Axar Patel and David Miller proving costly. The team's spin-bowling coach cited seaming conditions favoring pacers for Chahal's omission.

title: After 43 years, US family sold electrical company for $1.7B, gave workers $240M
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Why CBSE's result coming soon alerts fueling anxiety instead of clarity
content: CBSE Class 12 Results 2026 are expected soon, but repeated “coming soon” notifications from DigiLocker without a confirmed declaration date have sparked anxiety among students. Many have criticised the uncertainty on social media, especially after past trends suggested results usually followed shortly after DigiLocker updates. Students are now demanding clearer communication from CBSE amid mounting academic and emotional pressure.

title: 'Very sensitive to criticism': Manjrekar makes big Virat Kohli revelation
content: Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar believes Virat Kohli is “very sensitive to criticism” despite often saying he ignores outside noise. Manjrekar revealed Kohli sometimes became “cold” towards him after negative remarks. He added criticism may motivate Kohli to perform better. Manjrekar also praised Kohli’s aggressive leadership in Test cricket, calling him one of India’s greatest captains during his successful tenure.

title: Ranveer to play Lord Shiva in film adaptation of 'The Immortals of Meluha': Reports
content: Ranveer Singh is reportedly set to embody Lord Shiva in a grand cinematic trilogy based on Amish Tripathi's 'The Immortals of Meluha'. Singh's production banner has acquired the rights for this ambitious project, envisioned as a mythological universe.  Screenplay and world-building are underway, with filming for the first installment slated for 2028, following Singh's current film commitments.

title: Oil & gas royalty rejig: What govt big upstream reform means
content: The Indian government has rationalised royalty rates and methodologies for crude oil, natural gas, and casing head condensate to simplify regulations and boost the upstream energy sector. This move aims to bring greater clarity, consistency, and predictability to the oil and gas regime, encouraging fresh investments in exploration and production activities.

title: FIR filed against SP MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi over derogatory remarks against PM Modi
content: An FIR is filed against Samajwadi Party MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi in Mahoba, Uttar Pradesh, for allegedly making derogatory remarks against Prime Minister Narendra Modi. BJP leaders, including CM Yogi Adityanath, have strongly condemned the comments, calling them an insult to democratic values and demanding action from SP chief Akhilesh Yadav.

title: IPL Playoff Scenarios: With 15 matches to go, PBKS chances drop to 64.4%
content: With 15 league games left, Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Sunrisers Hyderabad and Gujarat Titans are favourites for IPL playoffs with nearly 88% qualification chances. Punjab Kings remain well placed despite slipping to 64.4%. Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals hover around 54%, while Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals face slim hopes. Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are eliminated.

title: US, UK sanctions target Iran-linked network accused of plotting attacks and moving funds
content: The US and UK have imposed separate sanctions targeting individuals, companies, and networks involved in Iran's oil sales, financial transactions, and alleged hostile activities. These measures aim to disrupt Iran's oil exports to China and cut off funding for the IRGC, while the UK focuses on shadow banking and destabilizing operations linked to criminal networks.

title: Rupee crashes to record low of 95.6 as US-Iran ceasefire jitters send oil soaring
content: The Indian Rupee hit a record low of 95.63 against the US dollar amid escalating geopolitical tensions and fragile investor sentiment. Intensifying Middle East conflict, rising oil prices, and sustained foreign fund outflows are pressuring the currency.  This economic uncertainty is also reflected in a significant dip in domestic stock markets.

title: 10 Arrested For Stabbing Telangana Student To Death Over Love Affair Dispute
content: Among those arrested are the girl's father Narsimha Yadav, her uncles Mallesh Yadav and Srisailam Yadav, her brother Paramesh, and a juvenile. Police also arrested several others involved in the conspiracy and the attack.

title: Andhra Cops Fire 10 Warning Shots To Prevent Railway Signal Tampering
content: GRP personnel fired warning shots after suspects tried to tamper with railway signals near Nidubrolu.

title: Trump Weighs Two Iran War Options With Ceasefire "On Massive Life Support"
content: Trump wants a permanent peace deal to end the war, but officials said that Tehran's rejection of many of the US demands and refusal to make concessions regarding its nuclear programme has put the military option back on the table.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Is AIADMK Set To Split? Inside The Sharp Rebellion Brewing Against Palaniswami
content: Many in the party are no longer willing to put up with repeated failures the AIADMK has faced under Palaniswami.

title: Government Seals, Fake Signs: How Man Siphoned Off Rs 4 Crore In Kumbh Fraud
content: Accused Abhishek Jhare fabricated counterfeit work orders using the seals in the name of Nashik divisional commissioner Praveen Gedam.

title: Suvendu Adhikari, Bengal Lawmakers To Take Oaths In Assembly On May 13-14
content: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari and the newly-elected MLAs will take oaths as legislators over the course of two days.

title: California City Mayor Pleads Guilty To Acting As Chinese Propaganda Agent
content: In the plea agreement, Wang admitted to promoting propaganda favourable to China "at the direction and control" of Chinese government officials from late 2020 through 2022, when she was elected to a four-year term on the Arcadia city council.

title: Unable To Supply Ganja After Taking Rs 700, Hyderabad AC Mechanic Killed By 10 Men
content: Police said two more suspects are believed to be involved and are on the run. Further investigation is ongoing.

title: Tragedy In Kota: 4 Mothers Dead Following Post-Delivery Complications
content: At least six women developed severe complications-including a drop in platelets and blood pressure, and urinary blockage-after C-sections at government run-New Medical College and Hospital (NMCH). Two of those women died during treatment.

title: Calls Grow For UK PM Keir Starmer To Resign After Local Election Defeat
content: More than 70 of Labour's 403 MPs have asked Keir Starmer to step down, unconvinced by his pledge to make the party bolder and better to assuage disgruntled voters impatient for change.

title: Once Insect-Free Iceland Now Sees Mosquitoes Amid Climate Change
content: Researchers have confirmed mosquitoes were detected just north of Reykjavik. The find officially ends Iceland’s status as the only Arctic nation without the biting insects.

title: Giant 65-Foot Trishul At Kailasagiri Hilltop Lights Up Vizag Skyline
content: Built by the Visakhapatnam Metropolitan Region Development Authority (VMRDA), the huge structure is visible from several parts of the city, especially at night when LED lights within the Trishul illuminate the skyline.

title: Satya Nadella Proud Of OpenAI Investment Amid Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against Sam Altman
content: Nadella told a jury that Microsoft's investment in the nonprofit arm, which now owns around a quarter of OpenAI Group PBC had helped create "one of the largest, most well-funded nonprofits in the world."

title: Netanyahu Recalls 'Love Fest' With India To Assert Israel Isn't Isolated
content: The Israeli PM's remarks come at a time when Israel's popularity has seen a sharp decline across the world over its continued military engagement with several neighbouring countries.

title: Assam Chief Minister Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Himanta Sarma, 4 Ministers Sworn In
content: Assam Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Along with Himanta Biswa Sarma, four ministers - two from the BJP and one each from its allies Asom Gana Parishad (AGP) and Bodoland People's Front (BPF) - will also be sworn in.

title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation LIVE Updates: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay Calls Assembly 'Heart Of Democracy' As Prabhakar Becomes Speaker
content: Vijay's oath ceremony, which took place on Sunday, came after four days of protracted political negotiations after his party received an unprecedented mandate that split open the binary politics that Tamil Nadu has been witnessing for over 50 years

title: Opinion: Meet Himanta Biswa Sarma, The "Chanakya" Of Assam
content: Under former Chief Minister Tarun Gogoi and earlier Hiteswar Saikia's mentorship, Himanta Biswa Sarma rose rapidly.
